description:
2022 Mercedes-Benz GLC 200, 2.0 TC I4, 4WD, 194bhp, 9 Speed Auto. AED 169,000 or AED 2,648 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 37, 882 KM's - 12 Months Blackline Warranty - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - High-Tech Silver Metallic - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Front & Rear Parking Sensors - 360 Camera - Electronic Front Seats with Memory Function - Glass Panoramic Roof - Park Assist - Cruise Control - Mercedes Drive Select - LED Headlights - Wired Apple Car Play / Android Auto - Satellite Navigation - Bluetooth Connectivity - Dual Zone Climate Control - Voice Control - 64 Colour Ambient Lighting - Power Folding Mirrors
